design_philosophy.name: Fitsiomax Clinical Minimalist
design_philosophy.mood: Professional, Sterile but welcoming, Efficient, Calm

usage_rules.headings: Use Manrope for all headings. Keep them Dark Slate (slate-900).
usage_rules.body: Use Inter for all interface text. Keep high contrast (slate-600+).

buttons.default: h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-all active:scale-95

cards.style: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden transition-all duration-200 hover:shadow-md

inputs.style: h-10 rounded-md border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-sky-500 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

login_background.usage: Use as a full-screen background for the login page with a white/90 overlay or blur.

role_header_abstract.usage: Optional subtle header background for the role selection screen.

physio_context.usage: Use if a split-screen login layout is chosen, on the side panel.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA standards. Slate-500 on white is borderline; prefer Slate-600.
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have a visible focus ring (sky-500).
accessibility.aria: Use proper ARIA labels for icon-only buttons.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. START WITH SCREEN 1: LOGIN. Build a clean, centered login card.
2. BACKGROUND: Use the 'login_background' image with a heavy white overlay (bg-white/90) or blur to ensure text readability. The goal is 'atmosphere', not 'distraction'.
3. BRANDING: Use the 'Fitsiomax OS' logo text in Manrope Bold, Slate-900. No complex logo image needed yet.
4. ROLE ACCESS: After login, show the 'Role Selection' screen. This should be a GRID of cards. One card for each role (Super Admin, Business Dev, Pre-sales, Branch Admin, Head Physio, Physio).
5. ROLE CARDS: Each card must have an Icon (Lucide), Title, and a 1-sentence description. Make them clickable.
6. GOOGLE SHEETS MOCK: Since OAuth is next step, just create a JSON object in the code to simulate the 'leads' data structure. No real API call yet.
7. TEST IDS: Add data-testid to every input, button, and role card.
8. THEME: FORCE LIGHT MODE. Do not add a toggle. The user requested 'mostly white'.
9. MINIMALISM: Avoid gradients. Use solid colors and subtle borders.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 etc.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states.
Export Components: Named exports. Pages: Default exports.
